pi_items.source: Code analysis: task.json description (line 5), export_result.sh (line 8 OUTPUT_FILE definition, line 20 file read), verifier.py (line 46 file existence check). All three independent sources confirm the same path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving a Case ID to /home/ga/found_case_id.txt. The expected output file path of /home/ga/found_case_id.txt is verified across task description, setup scripts, and verification code. The task uses ArkCase, a real complaint management system with Solr-based full-text search capabilities. Each task run creates a synthetic test case with a dynamically generated unique search phrase (Project Blue Sky + 8-character UUID) that is embedded in the case details and indexed by Solr. No external dataset is used; all data is generated on-the-fly during task initialization.
